domain: quantum biology (cryptochrome radical pair) + quantum mechanics (Berry phase / geometric phase) jointly
specific_mechanism: JOINT Berry-phase geometric-phase encoding + cryptochrome-radical-pair-style directional readout for LLM attention heads
llm_application: LLM attention heads carry geometric-phase directional encoding in their value-state space; the geometry can be measured by cycling Key-Value-Query parameter loops and observing accumulated phase
novelty_claim: the conjunction of Berry-phase formalism + cryptochrome-style geometric readout applied to LLM attention head; either alone is published
